title: Executive decks from Quick Dirty Test analysis
use_when: Executive decks from Quick Dirty Test analysis. Use when the user needs a product workflow for presentation & communication related to executive decks from quick dirty test analysis. Trigger terms: executive-communication, decision-support, hypothesis-testing, risk-analysis, quick-dirty-test.
do_not_use_when: Do not use Executive decks from Quick Dirty Test analysis when the request is mainly metric diagnosis, pricing, GTM, or implementation planning without UX evidence; route to the narrower Productize skill that owns that artifact instead. Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
output_artifact: Executive decks from Quick Dirty Test analysis UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks
framework_fit: Executive decks from Quick Dirty Test analysis fits Design work in the Design lifecycle when the user needs Executive decks from Quick Dirty Test analysis UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks and has enough product context to make tradeoffs explicit. Use it to produce a decision-ready artifact, not a framework tour.
failure_modes: Produces Executive decks from Quick Dirty Test analysis UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks without tying recommendations to the user's Design stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats Executive decks from Quick Dirty Test analysis as generic Design advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from Executive decks from Quick Dirty Test analysis when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $executive-decks-from-quick-dirty-test-analysis to turn this executive context into a decision-ready Executive decks from Quick Dirty Test analysis UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks.
examples.expected_artifact: Executive decks from Quick Dirty Test analysis UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks
